fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) (Id a) $== Id (equiv_prod_symm A B a)

forall (a b c : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) (g $o f) $==
fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) g $o fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) f

forall (a b : A * B) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) f $== fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) g
f $== g -> fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) f $== fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) g

forall a : A * B,
fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) (Id a) $== Id (equiv_prod_symm A B a)
fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) (Id a) $== Id (equiv_prod_symm A B a)

forall (a b c : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) (g $o f) $==
fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) g $o fmap (equiv_prod_symm A B) f

contents: (** Inclusions into a product category are functorial. *)

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor (fun a : A => (a, b))
Is0Functor (fun a : A => (a, b))
forall a b0 : A, (a $-> b0) -> (a, b) $-> (b0, b)
Is1Functor (fun a : A => (a, b))
Is1Functor (fun a : A => (a, b))

forall (a b0 : A) (f g : a $-> b0),
f $== g -> fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) f $== fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) g
forall a : A, fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) (Id a) $== Id (a, b)

forall (a b0 c : A) (f : a $-> b0) (g : b0 $-> c),
fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) (g $o f) $==
fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) g $o fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) f

forall (a b0 : A) (f g : a $-> b0),
f $== g -> fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) f $== fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) g

contents: intros a c f g p.

goals.conclusion: fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) f $== fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) g
forall a : A, fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) (Id a) $== Id (a, b)

forall (a b0 c : A) (f : a $-> b0) (g : b0 $-> c),
fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) (g $o f) $==
fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) g $o fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) f

contents: intros a c d f g.

goals.conclusion:
fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) (g $o f) $==
fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) g $o fmap (fun a0 : A => (a0, b)) f
Is0Functor (fun b : B => (a, b))
Is0Functor (fun b : B => (a, b))
forall a0 b : B, (a0 $-> b) -> (a, a0) $-> (a, b)
Is1Functor (fun b : B => (a, b))
Is1Functor (fun b : B => (a, b))

forall (a0 b : B) (f g : a0 $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) f $== fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) g
forall a0 : B, fmap (fun b : B => (a, b)) (Id a0) $== Id (a, a0)

forall (a0 b c : B) (f : a0 $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) (g $o f) $==
fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) g $o fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) f

forall (a0 b : B) (f g : a0 $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) f $== fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) g

contents: intros b c f g p.

goals.conclusion: fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) f $== fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) g
forall a0 : B, fmap (fun b : B => (a, b)) (Id a0) $== Id (a, a0)

forall (a0 b c : B) (f : a0 $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) (g $o f) $==
fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) g $o fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) f

contents: intros b c d f g.

goals.conclusion:
fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) (g $o f) $==
fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) g $o fmap (fun b0 : B => (a, b0)) f

contents: (** Functors from a product category are functorial in each argument *)
(** Conversely, if [F : A * B -> C] is a 0-functor in each variable, then it is a 0-functor. *)

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor F

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor F

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))

goals.conclusion: forall a b : A * B, (a $-> b) -> F a $-> F b

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))
forall a0 : A, Is0Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is0Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))

contents: exact (fmap (fun a0 => F (a0,b')) f $o fmap (fun b0 => F (a,b0)) g).
(** TODO: If we make this an instance, will it cause typeclass search to spin? *)
(** And if [F : A * B -> C] is a 1-functor in each variable and satisfies a coherence, then it is a 1-functor. *)

goals.conclusion: Is1Functor F

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))
forall a : A, Is1Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is1Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b : B => F (a1, b)) g $o fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b0)) f $==
fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b1)) f $o fmap (fun b : B => F (a0, b)) g

goals.conclusion: Is1Functor F

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))
forall a : A, Is1Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is1Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b : B => F (a1, b)) g $o fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b0)) f $==
fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b1)) f $o fmap (fun b : B => F (a0, b)) g

goals.conclusion: forall (a b : A * B) (f g : a $-> b), f $== g -> fmap F f $== fmap F g

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))
forall a : A, Is1Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is1Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b : B => F (a1, b)) g $o fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b0)) f $==
fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b1)) f $o fmap (fun b : B => F (a0, b)) g

goals.conclusion: forall a : A * B, fmap F (Id a) $== Id (F a)

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))
forall a : A, Is1Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is1Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b : B => F (a1, b)) g $o fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b0)) f $==
fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b1)) f $o fmap (fun b : B => F (a0, b)) g

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap F (g $o f) $== fmap F g $o fmap F f

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))
forall a : A, Is1Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is1Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b : B => F (a1, b)) g $o fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b0)) f $==
fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b1)) f $o fmap (fun b : B => F (a0, b)) g

goals.conclusion: forall (a b : A * B) (f g : a $-> b), f $== g -> fmap F f $== fmap F g

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))
forall a : A, Is1Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is1Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b : B => F (a1, b)) g $o fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b0)) f $==
fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b1)) f $o fmap (fun b : B => F (a0, b)) g

contents: intros [a b] [a' b'] [f g] [f' g'] [p p']; unfold fst, snd in * |- .

goals.conclusion: fmap F (f, g) $== fmap F (f', g')

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, Is0Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is0Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))
forall a0 : A, Is1Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is1Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g0 : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a1, b2)) g0 $o fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b0)) f0 $==
fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b1)) f0 $o fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a0, b2)) g0

contents: exact (fmap2 (fun b0 => F (a,b0)) p' $@@ fmap2 (fun a0 => F (a0,b')) p).

goals.conclusion: forall a : A * B, fmap F (Id a) $== Id (F a)

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))
forall a : A, Is1Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is1Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b : B => F (a1, b)) g $o fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b0)) f $==
fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b1)) f $o fmap (fun b : B => F (a0, b)) g

goals.conclusion: fmap F (Id (a, b)) $== Id (F (a, b))

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, Is0Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is0Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))
forall a0 : A, Is1Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is1Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a1, b2)) g $o fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b0)) f $==
fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b1)) f $o fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a0, b2)) g

contents: exact ((fmap_id (fun b0 => F (a,b0)) b $@@ fmap_id (fun a0 => F (a0,b)) _) $@ cat_idr _).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap F (g $o f) $== fmap F g $o fmap F f

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, Is0Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is0Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))
forall a : A, Is1Functor (fun b : B => F (a, b))
forall b : B, Is1Functor (fun a : A => F (a, b))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b : B => F (a1, b)) g $o fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b0)) f $==
fmap (fun a : A => F (a, b1)) f $o fmap (fun b : B => F (a0, b)) g

contents: intros [a b] [a' b'] [a'' b''] [f g] [f' g']; unfold fst, snd in * |- .

goals.conclusion: fmap F ((f', g') $o (f, g)) $== fmap F (f', g') $o fmap F (f, g)

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, Is0Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is0Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))
forall a0 : A, Is1Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is1Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g0 : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a1, b2)) g0 $o fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b0)) f0 $==
fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b1)) f0 $o fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a0, b2)) g0

contents: refine ((fmap_comp (fun b0 => F (a,b0)) g g' $@@ fmap_comp (fun a0 => F (a0,b'')) f f') $@ _).

goals.conclusion:
fmap (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b'')) f' $o fmap (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b'')) f $o
(fmap (fun b0 : B => F (a, b0)) g' $o fmap (fun b0 : B => F (a, b0)) g) $==
fmap F (f', g') $o fmap F (f, g)

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, Is0Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is0Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))
forall a0 : A, Is1Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is1Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g0 : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a1, b2)) g0 $o fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b0)) f0 $==
fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b1)) f0 $o fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a0, b2)) g0

goals.conclusion:
fmap (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b'')) f' $o fmap (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b'')) f $o
fmap (fun b0 : B => F (a, b0)) g' $==
fmap F (f', g') $o fmap (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b')) f

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, Is0Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is0Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))
forall a0 : A, Is1Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is1Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g0 : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a1, b2)) g0 $o fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b0)) f0 $==
fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b1)) f0 $o fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a0, b2)) g0

goals.conclusion:
fmap (fun b0 : B => F (a', b0)) g' $o fmap (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b')) f $->
fmap (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b'')) f $o fmap (fun b0 : B => F (a, b0)) g'

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, Is0Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is0Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))
forall a0 : A, Is1Functor (fun b0 : B => F (a0, b0))
forall b0 : B, Is1Functor (fun a0 : A => F (a0, b0))

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f0 : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g0 : b0 $-> b1),
fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a1, b2)) g0 $o fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b0)) f0 $==
fmap (fun a2 : A => F (a2, b1)) f0 $o fmap (fun b2 : B => F (a0, b2)) g0

contents: (** Applies a two variable functor via uncurrying. Note that the precondition on [C] is slightly weaker than that of [Bifunctor.fmap11]. *)
